name: The two creation accounts
notes: The first event Scripture tells twice. Genesis 1 gives the ordered, cosmic week, man made last; Genesis 2 returns to the sixth day and tells the making of man and his world up close. The links are thematic, not verse-for-verse: the man formed, the woman built, the beasts named, the food given. Genesis 1:27 fans out to two verses in the second account — the making of the man and of the woman told apart.
